top_signals.title: Lowe's beats Wall Street expectations against 'challenging' housing backdrop
top_signals.summary: Lowe's beat Wall Street expectations for its fiscal first-quarter earnings and reaffirmed its full-year guidance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
